goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stansted airport' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:30' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'rosa's bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'hotel type', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from stansted airport and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 11:30 and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and train ID
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called rosa's bed and breakfast
Make sure you get address, hotel type, and area
